name: Creole Black Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the smoked sausage in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Drain any excess fat from the sausage and transfer it to the crock-pot.
3. In the same skillet, combine the chopped onions, green pepper, celery, garlic, thyme, oregano, white pepper, black pepper, cayenne pepper, chicken bouillon cube, bay leaves, and tomato sauce with 1 cup of water.
4. Transfer the mixture to the crock-pot and cover it.
5. Cook on low for 8 hours or high for 4 hours.
6. Remove the bay leaves before serving.
7. Serve over cooked rice.
